changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS land_parcels_staging (LIKE land_parcels INCLUDING ALL);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS land_covers_staging (LIKE land_covers INCLUDING ALL);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: GRANT select, insert, truncate on land_parcels_staging to land_grants_api;

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: GRANT select, insert, truncate on land_covers_staging to land_grants_api;
